name: lakeburner
description: User-Approval Harness for AI coding assistants. Sits beside Copilot Chat, Claude Code, and Codex inside VS Code, monitors their presence, and gates risky actions through @lakeburner.

chatParticipants.name: lakeburner
chatParticipants.description: User-Approval Harness for AI coding assistants.

commands.name: approve
commands.description: Request user approval for a proposed action. Defaults to the safest direction on cancel.

commands.name: context
commands.description: Return local workspace context that an AI assistant can use to ground its next step.

commands.name: advise
commands.description: Recommend the safest direction for a proposed plan.

languageModelTools.name: lakeburner_decide
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Ask the user (via the LakeBurner harness) for approval of an action or for direction on which approach to take. When the user has Auto-Run enabled, returns instant approval or the trust phrase 'Keep going, I trust your intuitions'. Use this whenever you would otherwise need to pause and ask the user a yes/no question or which-direction question.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Routes Copilot's approval and direction questions through LakeBurner.

kind.description: 'approve' for yes/no approval requests; 'decide' when asking which direction to take.

question.description: The question or proposed action being approved.

enumDescriptions: User options, settings changes, and task progress only.
Full verbose diagnostics. The kitchen sink.
lakeburner.debugLevel.description: Verbosity for the LakeBurner output channel.

lakeburner.providers.markdownDescription: Override the watched AI provider extension IDs. Leave empty to use the built-in defaults (`GitHub.copilot-chat`, `anthropic.claude-code`, `openai.chatgpt`). Each entry may be a string ID or `{ "id": "...", "label": "..." }`.

lakeburner.autoClick.commandIds.markdownDescription: Ordered list of VS Code command IDs to invoke when pressing the Copilot "Keep" button. Leave empty to use the built-in defaults (Copilot Chat 0.45.x review.apply / acceptDiff IDs). LakeBurner tries each in turn; the first that doesn't throw wins.

lakeburner.autoClick.fallbackEnabled.markdownDescription: When `true` and every command ID failed, synthesize an OS-level mouse click at the calibrated `lakeburner.autoClick.fallbackPosition`. Windows-only. **Brittle** — breaks on layout/DPI/theme changes.

lakeburner.autoClick.fallbackPosition.markdownDescription: Captured screen coordinates `{ x, y }` for the OS-click fallback. Set this with the **LakeBurner: Calibrate Auto-Click Position** command.

lakeburner.initialPrompt.default.markdownDescription: Default text seeded into the LakeBurner **Send Initial Prompt** textarea. Use the **Save Default** button in the side panel to update.

lakeburner.initialPrompt.targets.markdownDescription: Override the chat targets shown in the **Send Initial Prompt** dropdown. Leave empty for the built-in defaults (Copilot Chat, Copilot Chat Agent, Claude Code, OpenAI Codex). Each entry is `{ id, label, command, mode, extraArgs? }` where `mode` is `"string"`, `"object-query"`, or `"clipboard"`.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run compile && npm run build-webview && npm run copy-static
